summary: Completed comprehensive testing of LuminaLMS multi-feature implementation. All features working correctly: Dialog transparency fixed (bg-white), Export Students to Excel, Course Editor with duration settings (weeks/months/years), Module accordion with lessons/quiz upload, Admissions page with EUR currency, and all action buttons functional.
passed_tests: Admin login with admin@unilms.edu/admin123
Dialog/popup boxes show with white background (rgb(255, 255, 255)) - NOT transparent
Users page: Export Students button downloads Excel file with success toast 'Exported 5 students to Excel'
Users page: Add User dialog displays correctly with white background
Users page: Dropdown actions working (Edit User, Lock Account, Delete User)
Courses page: Edit button navigates to Course Editor
Course Editor: Course Code field editable
Course Editor: Course Title field editable
Course Editor: Description field editable
Course Editor: Department field editable
Course Editor: Assigned Lecturer dropdown functional
Course Editor: Duration Type dropdown shows Weeks/Months/Years options
Course Editor: Module accordion displays existing modules (Week 1, 2, 3...)
Course Editor: Expanded module shows lessons with Add Lesson and Upload Quiz buttons
Course Editor: Application Fee shows €50 (EUR currency)
Admissions page: Shows application stats (Pending Payment, Pending Review, Approved, Rejected)
Admissions page: Shows Total Revenue with EUR symbol (€)
Admissions page: Applications table displays correctly
Admissions page: Status filter dropdown functional
All 31 backend API tests passed including new Course/Module/Application endpoints
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data. Created test modules during API testing (TEST_Module for Testing, TEST_Module for Lessons, TEST_Module for Quiz)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All multi-feature implementations tested and working: Dialog bg-white fix confirmed, Export Students to Excel working with xlsx library, Course Editor fully functional with duration settings and module management, Admissions page working with EUR currency. 31 backend tests passing including new endpoints for modules, lessons, and quiz upload.

features_verified.dialog_transparency_fix: PASSED - Dialog background is rgb(255, 255, 255) white, not transparent

features_verified.duration_type_dropdown: PASSED - Shows Weeks, Months, Years options
features_verified.module_accordion: PASSED - Displays modules with lessons, Add Lesson and Upload Quiz buttons
features_verified.admissions_stats: PASSED - Shows Pending Payment, Pending Review, Approved, Rejected, Total Revenue
features_verified.eur_currency: PASSED - Application Fee shows €50, Total Revenue shows € symbol
features_verified.dropdown_actions: PASSED - Edit User, Lock Account, Delete User options functional
